name: webswing-directdraw-javascript
license: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 or later

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run proto && npm run type-check && webpack --config webpack-prd.config.js
scripts.proto: pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/main/webapp/proto/dd.js --no-encode --no-create --no-verify --no-delimited ../src/proto/javascript/directdraw.proto && pbts -o src/main/webapp/proto/dd.d.ts src/main/webapp/proto/dd.js
